_comment: Conforming manifest for a small project under Lithos's single full-lifecycle governance model. It carries only the required fields and terse values, but omits no governance anchor: every role, all four gates, the autonomous-PR boundaries, and the full knowledge spine are present. This demonstrates that a small project may keep content concise without dropping structure; it is the same governance_model as valid-full-lifecycle-governance.json, not a lighter tier.

conformance_claim.statement: conforms to Lithos 1.x under the full-lifecycle governance model

controller.assigned_to: the maintainer or an orchestrating agent under maintainer instruction

implementation_agent.assigned_to: a contributing engineer or an AI agent

reviewer.assigned_to: a contributor not involved in the implementation

verifier.assigned_to: the continuous integration system and the reviewer

knowledge_governance.evidence_retention: dev logs and run records kept under docs/dev_log/ for the stated audit horizon
knowledge_governance.stale_knowledge_handling: use-driven validation; frozen records are immutable
